CustomObject.label: VS Error Log
CustomObject.description: VS-ERRLOG enabler object (unticketed gap, see D-new-a). A minimal, decoupled fault-path landing zone for record-triggered/scheduled Flows (VS-03 existing screen flow, VS-19 upcoming confirmation flow, and future flows) to log errors from their fault connectors. No lookups by design so any context can log without a relationship dependency. OWD Private (design intent: only admins/support review errors; not a citizen- or facility-visible object). No Aadhaar or other personal data may be written to VS_Message__c or VS_Context__c.
